base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ninpo_fire_wheel — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1988 ninja gaiden. Art of Fire Wheel — 3 fire-orbs rotating. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
